title: xyris navicularis
intro: Xyris navicularis is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Xyridaceae, commonly known as yellow-eyed grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing skin irritations. Traditionally, Xyris navicularis is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or ointment form to harness its medicinal properties.
